name: sagar-plugins
description: Sagar's personal Factory plugins marketplace — multi-model droid toolkit split into focused plugins.

plugins.name: investigation
plugins.description: Investigation droid trio: fast triage (quick-analysis), thorough repo investigation (deep-understanding), and external web research (deep-research).

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Pre-merge review droids: strict diff reviewer (change-review) and security reviewer (security).

plugins.name: synthesis
plugins.description: Synthesis droids: PR description writer (pr-describer) and Conventional Commits message writer (commit-message-writer).

plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: Meta droids for working on agentic configs themselves: prompt audit (prompt-optimizer) and apply (doc-generator).
